steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: The blank fills "making ______ the first time the organization would appoint a Vietnamese leader." The pronoun refers to the singular event of Lê Lương Minh becoming secretary-general in January 2013.

steps.title: Rule: use "this" for a singular, specific, already-stated event
steps.content:
Per-choice diagnosis:

A. "these" — plural demonstrative; the event is singular. Incorrect.

B. "those" — plural demonstrative; same problem. Incorrect.

C. "this" — singular demonstrative pointing back to the specific appointment just described. Substitution: "making this the first time..." reads naturally. Correct.

D. "some" — indefinite pronoun implying an unspecified quantity; the appointment is a defined singular event, not an unspecified one. Incorrect.

C is correct.
